svg.title: AI code migration platform architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer platform: source code inputs converge into a language-aware parser, flow through the knowledge graph engine and AI intelligence layer, then branch into Phase 1 upgrade and Phase 2 decomposition paths, merge at a validation gate, and emerge as production-ready output.

g.text: Deep semantic parsing per language — not generic transpilation
Entities · relationships · call graphs · data flows · semantic intent
Design patterns · IT standards · compliance · semantic analysis
Behavioral parity · SOLID · 12-factor · security · test coverage
Code · tests · docs · migration plan · rollback strategy
